# Code of Conduct

The full P31 Code of Conduct lives at [`docs/CODE-OF-CONDUCT.md`](../docs/CODE-OF-CONDUCT.md).

It is adapted from the [Contributor Covenant 2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/) (CC BY 4.0) with P31-specific clauses for:

- Voice doctrine adherence (DELTA language and Public Voice gates)
- No medical advice on public surfaces (sub-medical-grade by design)
- K₄ family mesh confidentiality (children's full names protected, mesh state private)
- Operator-condition awareness (hypoparathyroidism + AuDHD context)
- No surveillance of children
- No engagement-maximization patterns
- No cloud LLM in operator-confidential surfaces

**Reporting:** `conduct@p31labs.org` (forwards to the operator until the committee is constituted), or open a private security advisory on the relevant repository (the operator triages both).

See [`docs/CODE-OF-CONDUCT.md`](../docs/CODE-OF-CONDUCT.md) for the full text, enforcement guidelines, and scope.
